note: Radar is a geo-location platform handling 1B+ API calls/day. Core backend written in TypeScript and Rust. Engineering Manager role requires Rust knowledge alongside team leadership.
description: Lead engineering teams at Radar, a location data platform built on TypeScript and Rust. Requires deep understanding of the Rust/TS backend stack alongside people management.

note: Radar's data platform stack uses TypeScript, Rust, and Python. Role focuses on building and scaling the data infrastructure powering 1B+ API calls per day.
description: Build and scale the data infrastructure at Radar using TypeScript, Rust, and Python, supporting billions of location API calls per day.

note: Core Radar product stack: TypeScript, Rust, React, and Objective-C/Kotlin for mobile. Full-stack role spanning backend services and mobile SDKs.
description: Work across Radar's core product using TypeScript, Rust, React, and mobile languages (Objective-C/Kotlin) to deliver location-aware features at scale.

note: Backend stack at Radar is TypeScript, Rust, Python, and Scala. Role owns server-side features and pipelines powering the location platform.
description: Build backend services at Radar using TypeScript, Rust, Python, and Scala, owning server-side product features and offline data pipelines.

role: Senior / Staff Product Engineer, Machine Learning
note: ML stack at Radar includes Python, Rust, Airflow, and Spark. Role focuses on machine learning models and data pipelines for geospatial intelligence.
description: Build ML models and data pipelines for Radar's geospatial intelligence platform using Python, Rust, Airflow, and Spark.

note: Radar's geospatial database is written in Rust. QA Engineer role requires understanding the Rust-powered storage layer for thorough testing of location accuracy and performance.
description: Test and ensure quality of Radar's location platform, including the Rust-powered geospatial database that underpins 1B+ API calls per day.

role: Senior / Staff Security Engineer, Red Team
note: Radar's backend is built in TypeScript and Rust. Red Team role requires security expertise across the full stack including Rust services.
description: Red Team security engineering at Radar, stress-testing TypeScript and Rust backend services that handle sensitive location data at scale.

note: Main server language at Radar is TypeScript and Rust. SRE role owns reliability, observability, and infrastructure for the location platform.
description: Own reliability and infrastructure for Radar's location platform, which runs on TypeScript and Rust server-side, handling 1B+ API calls per day.

description: Polars is a blazing-fast dataframe library written in Rust. The Performance Engineer role focuses on query engine optimization, SIMD vectorization, and memory layout improvements.

note: Qdrant is a Rust-native vector database. VP of Engineering role leads the engineering org with Rust mentioned in requirements.
description: Lead engineering at Qdrant, a Rust-only vector similarity search engine used for AI/ML workloads. Rust mentioned in role requirements.
